author: draganrakita
content:
We have three proposals, all three effects how balance/call stack overflow checks are done in calls and handling of warming and BAL inclusion of target account:
* Currently implemented. Both target and eip7702 delegate are warmed and incuded in BAL
* Ignacio PR in spec (or EIP). Target is warmed and included in BAL, eip7702 delegate is warmed but **not** included in BAL. [Ignacio comment](https://discord.com/channels/595666850260713488/1506543443172921464/1516447234349207833)
* My proposal: do check before warming. Target and eip7702 delegate are not warmed or included in BAL.

content: We have three proposals, all three
